title: Pumpkin Pie
instructions: Beat eggs and sugar together until light and fluffy.
Stir in pumpkin, spices, and salt; mix thoroughly.
Bake at 450 degrees F for 8 minutes.
Reduce heat to 325 degrees F and bake for another 40-45 minutes or until filling is just set.
Let cool and serve with freshly whipped cream.
notes: Mark's favorite pie that I make at Thanksgiving.
